description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a flat, smooth surface and four sturdy legs, supporting a full desktop computer setup. On top of the desk sits a widescreen monitor, a standard keyboard, a mouse, and a black computer tower, all arranged for ergonomic use. The desk's surface is uncluttered, with no drawers or additional storage features visible, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. The wood finish is matte and medium brown, giving the desk a warm, professional appearance suitable for office or study environments. The computer tower is connected to the monitor with a visible cable, and all components are proportionally sized for typical adult use. The overall construction appears robust, with the desk capable of supporting the weight of the computer equipment and other office items.
description: A medium-brown wooden desk with a flat top and four legs, supporting a desktop computer setup including a monitor, keyboard, mouse, and tower. The design is minimalist and functional, with no visible storage features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full desktop setup with monitor, keyboard, mouse, and computer tower clearly visible on the desk's surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the profile of the computer tower and monitor, with cables visible at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the monitor and computer tower, as well as the connecting cable and the desk's sturdy construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the keyboard and mouse placement, and the side profiles of the monitor and computer tower.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the monitor, keyboard, and mouse arranged for direct access, while the computer tower sits to one side; the back is defined by the visible cables and rear of the monitor.
